mxCell.value:
Legend
--- Prerequisite (AND)
... Prerequisite (OR)
- - Mutually Exclusive
解决温饱问题的共和国
支持红色印度（需要农村改革派）
支持黑色印度（需要重建黄埔军校）
密谋刺杀毛泽东（解锁决议）
直接武装夺权（直接开启内战）

%3CmxGraphModel%3E%3Croot%3E%3CmxCell%20id%3D%220%22%2F%3E%3CmxCell%20id%3D%221%22%20parent%3D%220%22%2F%3E%3CmxCell%20id%3D%222%22%20parent%3D%221%22%20style%3D%22rounded%3D1%3BwhiteSpace%3Dwrap%3Bhtml%3D1%3BfillColor%3D%23f5f5f5%3BstrokeColor%3D%23666666%3B%22%20value%3D%22%E4%B8%AD%E5%A4%AE%E8%AD%A6%E5%8D%AB%E5%9B%A2%22%20vertex%3D%221%22%3E%3CmxGeometry%20height%3D%22120%22%20width%3D%22180%22%20x%3D%223400%22%20y%3D%225280%22%20as%3D%22geometry%22%2F%3E%3C%2FmxCell%3E%3C%2Froot%3E%3C%2FmxGraphModel%3E贺衷寒接管党中央
黄埔优秀毕业生聚会（林彪成为法西斯政治顾问）
中华人民复兴政府成立
中日共建的大东亚共荣圈

蓝衣军扩权%3CmxGraphModel%3E%3Croot%3E%3CmxCell%20id%3D%220%22%2F%3E%3CmxCell%20id%3D%221%22%20parent%3D%220%22%2F%3E%3CmxCell%20id%3D%222%22%20parent%3D%221%22%20style%3D%22rounded%3D1%3BwhiteSpace%3Dwrap%3Bhtml%3D1%3BfillColor%3D%23f5f5f5%3BstrokeColor%3D%23666666%3B%22%20value%3D%22%E5%9B%BD%E5%AE%B6%E5%A4%8D%E5%85%B4%E8%BF%90%E5%8A%A8%22%20vertex%3D%221%22%3E%3CmxGeometry%20height%3D%22120%22%20width%3D%22180%22%20x%3D%224130%22%20y%3D%226020%22%20as%3D%22geometry%22%2F%3E%3C%2FmxCell%3E%3C%2Froot%3E%3C%2FmxGraphModel%3E
瓜分东北（像日本发送事件之类的）
